Yang Ling ś•äťĹ°
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Ling (ś•äťĹ°). Goes to fight Guan Yu, taunts him but is killed in a few bouts. Yang Ling is a fictional character. Yang Ling was affiliated with the Han Xuan Dynasty.
